payload.title: Update session guide with event file and dependency documentation
payload.description: Added .endless/events/ to Where Things Live section, added warning not to gitignore events, replaced raw-SQL dependency workaround with task block/unblock/deps CLI commands.

payload.title: Record that .endless/events/ must be committed to git, never gitignored
payload.description: Event segment files (.endless/events/*.jsonl) are the source of truth for event-sourced state. They must be committed to git for clone-completeness: a fresh clone arrives with task state intact. The SQLite DB is a rebuildable projection. Decided 2026-04-24 during architecture planning.

payload.title: Record that Kairos uses epoch 2000-01-01 and 15-char Crockford Base32 format
payload.description: Kairos timestamps are 75-bit values (52-bit microsecond offset from 2000-01-01, 7-bit logical counter, 16-bit node ID) encoded as 15 chars of Crockford Base32. Epoch 2000-01-01 covers until 2142 and predates any realistic JIRA/task history. Fixed epoch, not configurable, because different epochs between machines would break cross-machine timestamp interpretation. Decided 2026-04-25.

payload.title: Record that Go is the single writer for events and SQLite, Python shells out
payload.description: All event writes and task SQL mutations go through the Go binary (endless-event). Python CLI shells out to Go for writes and passes intent (project name, after_id) not resolved data (project_id, sort_order). Go owns all write-supporting SQL including reads that inform writes. Python retains display reads for now. Decided 2026-04-26.

payload.title: Record that node_id is stored in ~/.config/endless/config.json
payload.description: Node ID (4-char hex, uint16) is stored as a property in the existing config.json rather than a separate file. Kairos package has no file I/O; the caller reads/creates node_id in config.json and passes it to the Go binary via --node-id flag. Decided 2026-04-24.

payload.title: Record that ~/.config/endless/ becomes optional git repo for portfolio state
payload.description: No separate changelog repo. Cross-project events live in ~/.config/endless/ which can optionally be a git repo. .gitignore excludes endless.db (rebuildable projection) and local cache. Multi-machine sync via git pull/push. Decided 2026-04-24.

payload.title: Record that event segments are per-node to eliminate git merge conflicts
payload.description: Events stored in segmented files: .endless/events/events-{node_id}-{seq}.jsonl. Each machine writes only to its own segments (identified by node ID). Git merge adds new files rather than modifying shared lines. Rotation at 10,000 events per segment. Compaction (state.jsonl) is local-only and gitignored. Decided 2026-04-24.

payload.title: Record that decisions are temporarily stored as task type until E-841 ADR system
payload.description: Added 'decision' to the allowed task types as a temporary measure to capture architecture decisions. These will migrate to proper ADRs when E-801/E-841 (documents system + ADR workflow) lands. Decisions are created with --type decision --status confirmed and include rationale in the description. Decided 2026-04-26.

payload.title: Add decision type to task types
payload.description: Added 'decision' to the allowed --type values on task add. Temporary measure to capture architecture decisions as tasks until E-841 ADR system is implemented.

fields.description: Testing all mutations through Go bridge
